pending_context.whisper: Clare Ried and Bells on it / Clare Reid / Bells on it
pending_context.notes: "I don't know where you heard of Clare Ried and Bells on it. That was one of my students." Reading: Clarice Reid as a former Burns student in Belzoni (Humphreys County) during her 1959 student-teaching practicum. The "Bells on it" is Whisper compression of "in Belzoni." A "Dr. Clarice Reid" was a prominent Mississippi-born African-American pediatric hematologist at the NIH National Heart Lung and Blood Institute (Sickle Cell Disease Branch director); plausibly the same person Burns is recalling.
"Clare Ried and Cara Harris and Selvam Mohu turned out to be very productive people." Local Belzoni student name; no canonical anchor; recorded as preserved.

(Silver City, MS is a documented Humphreys County small town near Belzoni.)
